goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get area and star of the hotel
